question: Will Anthropic's next ARR figure show an accelerating % growth rate?
reason: Anthropic's annualized revenue surged from $9B to $30B between December 2025 and April 2026, indicating accelerating growth.
evidence: Anthropic's annualized revenue increased from $9 billion at the end of 2025 to over $30 billion in April 2026. ([sacra.com](https://sacra.com/research/anthropic/?utm_source=openai))

The number of business customers spending over $1 million annually with Anthropic doubled to more than 1,000 since February 2026. ([venturebeat.com](https://venturebeat.com/technology/anthropic-says-it-hit-a-30-billion-revenue-run-rate-after-crazy-80x-growth?utm_source=openai))

The company announced an expanded partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation TPU capacity beginning in 2027. ([siliconangle.com](https://siliconangle.com/2026/04/06/anthropic-taps-google-broadcom-yet-ai-chips-revenue-run-rate-tops-30b/?utm_source=openai))
